name: @chaafoo/anchored
description: anchored — the verification gate for AI work. Evidence-gated runs: no criterion reaches done without validator-authored proof, grounded in an executed command.

scripts.test:e2e: files=$(find src -name '*.e2e.ts' | sed 's|^|./|'); if [ -n "$files" ]; then bun test $files; else echo 'no *.e2e.ts files — skipping'; fi
scripts.test:int: files=$(find src -name '*.int.ts' | sed 's|^|./|'); if [ -n "$files" ]; then bun test $files; else echo 'no *.int.ts files — skipping'; fi
scripts.test: npm run coverage:specs && npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:int
scripts.bundle:plugin: bun build src/bin.ts --target=node --outfile=../plugin/bin/anchored && chmod +x ../plugin/bin/anchored && echo 'bundled → plugin/bin/anchored'
